programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Chimp Change
programme.desc: Naomi the chimp overcomes a medical condition and finally becomes a mum.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: New Neck of the Woods
programme.desc: Taronga Zoo’s new African Savanna Precinct welcomes its residents.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Once a Cheetah, Always a Cheetah
programme.desc: Taronga Zoo’s hand-raised cheetah bonds with an unexpected furry friend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Don’t Bilby a Stranger
programme.desc: A look at what makes the Taronga Zoo in Sydney, Australia run.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Hungry, Hungry Hippo
programme.desc: Keepers at Taronga’s zoo in Dubbo welcome a baby hippo to the herd.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Sealing the Deal
programme.desc: Keepers at Taronga Zoo work tirelessly to save the lives of injured seals.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: The Tortoise and the Hair…less Cat
programme.desc: Drs. Hodges and Ferguson work to save a bunny that has been attacked by the family cat.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Goose on the Loose
programme.desc: Dr. Hodges is in surgery when a baby goat in distress comes to the office.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Alpacapalooza
programme.desc: The doctors are busy taking care of the rural Georgia animal population.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Hump Day
programme.desc: Drs. Hodges and Ferguson see an unusual patient in Georgia: an unruly camel.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Yeti: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: UFOs in the U.S.A.
programme.desc: Cameras capture lights in the night sky of the Mojave Desert and a strange object above the Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee. Experts use cutting edge tech to investigate documented UFO sightings across the US.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: UFOs in the U.S.A.
programme.desc: Cameras capture lights in the night sky of the Mojave Desert and a strange object above the Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee. Experts use cutting edge tech to investigate documented UFO sightings across the US.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Secrets of the Star Disk
programme.desc: An ancient bronze disk adorned with gold may contain the oldest images of the cosmos ever discovered; using new research and the latest tech, experts investigate if this artifact could be the work of a prehistoric astrologer or just an elaborate hoax.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Treasure Scrolls
programme.desc: A bizarre find called Copper Scroll is one of the famous Dead Sea Scrolls, but it's unlike any of the others. This strange relic might hold clues to a long-lost treasure, and cutting-edge science may finally reveal answers to this billion-dollar mystery.

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Relic That Sees the Future
programme.desc: A bizarre 3,000 year-old gold relic crafted with intricately designed cryptic patterns is believed to form a highly complex celestial code. Using advanced imaging technology, experts speculate that it could be an ancient device for predicting the future.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Black Mirror
programme.desc: The Obsidian Mirror is a mysterious artifact crafted from volcanic rock, and it's said to be a supernatural device used to communicate with angels and spirits. Experts use cutting-edge tech to discover who made this strange relic and why.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Horror of Dead Man's Island
programme.desc: When a gigantic ship emerges from the sands of a strange island, experts investigate; what they find reveals evidence of a horrific Viking massacre.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Hikers stumble onto the brutalized corpse of amateur boxer Johnnie Wilson, hidden beneath a pile of branches. Plagued by false starts and blind alleys, the case finally gains traction when investigators get their hands dirty.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Back of the Shed
programme.desc: A backyard shed in a Michigan trailer park holds the answers to a dark secret regarding a missing teenage couple. Police interview their families, but one member is evasive, deepening the mystery and setting off a covert manhunt across the Midwest.

programme.title: See No Evil: All That It Seems
programme.desc: A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, produces one casualty.

programme.title: See No Evil: Far From Home
programme.desc: In 2017, Chinese exchange student, Yingying Zhang, mysteriously vanishes from the University of Illinois campus. Police and FBI turn to video surveillance footage to uncover the shocking and sinister reality and bring a cold-blooded murderer to justice.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Dangerous Obsession
programme.desc: Young mother Casey Morgan is found murdered inside her home. Police must unravel her dating history with the help of her friends, neighbors, and co-workers to unmask the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Casey Anthony insists that her 2-year-old daughter Caylee was abducted by the nanny, but investigators soon discover the child has been missing for 31 days. Where is Caylee?

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: A Shallow Grave
programme.desc: As the Casey Anthony trial begins, the defense unleashes shocking allegations and the prosecution reveals their theory of how Caylee died.

programme.title: Casey Anthony: An American Murder Mystery: Ten Hours, 40 Minutes
programme.desc: As the Casey Anthony trial continues, the defense takes centre stage and the verdict sparks outrage across the country.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Diary of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A college student disappears at the start of his freshman year without a trace, leaving his family and his girlfriend reeling. When authorities look to his best friend for answers, they uncover a love triangle gone wrong.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Have a Surprise for You
programme.desc: A woman arrives at her parents' house to find them bleeding on the floor. Her 16-year-old brother claims that their dad shot their mother and then himself. But investigators quickly uncover the shocking truth as they confront a cunning teenage psychopath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: In 1995, a beloved mother is found raped and murdered in the accounting office where she works. The bloody body of her young daughter is nearby. But as police photograph the scene, they get the shock of their careers.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fence Face Off
programme.desc: Complaints about dogs running loose lead to the construction of a fence between two long-time neighbors, but the problem isn't solved and flaring tempers lead to fist fights, stabbings, and ultimately a shocking shootout captured on video.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: She Set Me Up
programme.desc: Evansville, Indiana Police rely on an unlikely source of information as they search for the person responsible for shooting 28-year-old D'Angelo White. Cryptic clues left by the victim himself challenge the investigative skills of veteran detectives.

programme.title: Body Cam: Life in Ruins
programme.desc: In Ohio, SWAT tears down a house to arrest two brothers wanted for murder. In Washington, a high-speed pursuit ends when a crash entangles an officer's car in live electrical cables. In Texas, a DWI driver hits a goods train carrying explosive chemicals.

programme.title: Body Cam: On the Edge
programme.desc: Arkansas police stop a knife man enraged over a midnight pot roast. In Delray Beach, officers must rescue two children teetering on a ledge with their mom who's high on drugs. A trespasser in Utah attacks an officer with his own baton.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Sing Karaoke
programme.desc: Joe Crouch wakes up one morning, and after 40 years of marriage, shoots his wife while she sleeps. He flees to Florida and embraces his fugitive life. He funds his hobbies by robbing banks. It is his love of karaoke that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Sing Karaoke
programme.desc: Joe Crouch wakes up one morning, and after 40 years of marriage, shoots his wife while she sleeps. He flees to Florida and embraces his fugitive life. He funds his hobbies by robbing banks. It is his love of karaoke that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Truth Will Set You Free

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.desc: Experts solve the steady stream of home improvement problems faced by viewers. Familiar faces, including Kevin O'Connor, Tom Silva, Richard Trethewey and Roger Cook answer questions submitted by viewers.

programme.title: This Old House: Detroit/ A Mason Steps Up
programme.desc: For damaged oak flooring, Tommy uses a clever fix. Mark McCullough fixes front steps that need repairing. Kevin sees how a famous Detroit ceramic studio has been making tile for a century.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Experts address homeowner problems while completing renovations on a house project.

programme.title: This Old House: Detroit/ Going Old School for Tile and Molding
programme.desc: Experts address homeowner problems while completing renovations on a house project.

programme.title: This Old House: Detroit/ Rebirth in Detroit
programme.desc: After seven months of hard work, the project is complete. Tour the interior and exterior of the house to see the major areas of improvement and preservation. Celebrate the beautiful transformation with Frank, Tamiko and everyone who pitched in.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael figure out the open-concept dilemma at the Suburban House and turn their attention outside, where their plans for a spacious new deck come up short. They must quickly find a solution before the fast-approaching open house arrives.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Space in the Suburbs
programme.desc: San Diego transplants Mary and Dustyn are on the hunt for their family's dream home in Waco, Texas, and they're looking for a four-bedroom with a large yard and open space for hosting.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes 'r' Us
programme.desc: Four imaginative bakers are going to have to unleash their inner child as they compete for the chance to serve their creations at a black tie awards gala for the Chicago Toy and Game Fair.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: The Big 'not So Easy'
programme.desc: Seven teams with dreams of running their own food trucks arrive in the streets of the French Quarter in New Orleans where they meet Tyler Florence. For their first challenge, the teams must create their own version of a beignet and sell it.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: New Marching Orders
programme.desc: The remaining six teams arrive at the Naval Air Station Pensacola in Florida to receive their next marching orders. For this challenge, the highest grossing teams from the first leg of the race get to pick teams to work with to feed 50 service members.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: The remaining five trucks arrive in Tuscaloosa, Alabama, to find Tyler and pastry chef Jan Moon waiting for them with a challenge: to crack the most pecans in just 15 minutes. The teams must then use their pecans in a dessert dish to sell on their trucks.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: Hot Chicken in the City
programme.desc: Tyler has a surprise for the four remaining food truck teams: a taste of Nashville's famous hot chicken, prepared by Nashville native and owner of restaurant 400 Degrees, Aqui Hines. The teams sample and see if they can take the heat.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: Fresh Off the Farm
programme.desc: The remaining three food truck teams arrive at a peach farm in Athens, Georgia, where they meet Tyler and Athens chef Mimi Maumus. In the first challenge, the teams make a savory dish using the provided ingredients and peaches.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: The Race Through Savannah
programme.desc: The final two teams arrive in Savannah, and Tyler's first challenge brings them out of the food trucks and into a new mobile selling vehicle: pedicabs. Each team has a half hour to make as much food as possible to sell out of their own pedicabs.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the South: Sweet Home Alabama

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat on a Stick

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Something Smells/ Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Bob eats some sea-onion ice cream; Mr. Krabs' daughter makes some big changes.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Scroll of the Demodragon
programme.desc: The Turtles believe they have defeated their old enemies, but they soon discover a new evil is rising.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Forgotten Swordsmen
programme.desc: Karai searches for the Kuro Kabuto, claiming to be the rightful heir to the Foot Clan, when she encounters an old rival.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Heart of Evil
programme.desc: Donnie's grudge against Don Vizioso threatens the Turtles' mission.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: End Times
programme.desc: The Turtles must defeat Kavaxas and prevent him from destroying the world.

programme.title: Nick News: Kids, Immigration, and Equality
programme.desc: Children who have made an impact on real world issues are profiled.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Stego Search
programme.desc: The Warden takes away Javi’s keytar, putting him in a bad mood, which he refuses to explain to the team. Javi is forced to open up about his problems in order to find his Zord.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: The Queen Is Back
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Thumb War
programme.desc: A new crime-fighting duo appears in town who turn out to be Captain Man and Kid Danger's biggest fans.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Toddler Invasion
programme.desc: When The Toddler takes control of the Man Cave, Charlotte and Jasper have to find a way to sneak into the Man Cave.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Spelling Bee Hard
programme.desc: Dr. Minyak challenges Captain Man to a Spelling Bee.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Rock Box Dump
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Toon in for Danger
programme.desc: When Henry and Ray get a copy of the new Kid Danger and Captain Man cartoon and see that it's horrible, they must hurry to fix the cartoon before the big premiere party.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Meet Cute Crush
programme.desc: Henry and Ray try to help Piper carry out a 'meet cute' with a new boy she likes from school.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Rubber Duck
programme.desc: When Ray accidentally destroys Henry's dad's prized remote-control car, they throw a manicure party to raise money to fix it.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Perfect Match / All Fired Up
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Poetry Scam / Crushed Out
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Illusory Dragon! Mirage Fafnir!
programme.desc: Still recovering from their loss to Free De La Hoya, Hikaru and Hyuga decide to follow the Blading Legend’s own training regimen to learn the secrets behind his success.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Dream Team! Tag Battle!
programme.desc: With their training trip to Spain coming to an end, Hyuga and Hikaru are desperate to leave a lasting impression with one final face-off against Free in an extreme Tag Battle.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: NFL 360: Fritz Pollard: A Forgotten Man
programme.desc: NFL 360 pays tribute to Fritz Pollard, one of pro football's first black players and its first black head coach. Pollard integrated the fledgling NFL a century ago, winning its inaugural title before a wave of segregation cast him aside.

programme.title: NFL Roundtables: Field Generals
programme.desc: Trailblazing quarterbacks Doug Williams, James Harris, Warren Moon and Michael Vick sit down and discuss their hardships and triumphs of being a black quarterback in the NFL.

programme.desc: Corbin Bleu joins the Show Offs to create a sci-fi musical.

programme.desc: Matt loses a little blood, Spencer meets his roommate, and the group meets some new classmates.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help two generations of couples sort out their marital problems.

programme.title: The Inspectors: Birds Eye View
programme.desc: Amanda and Mitch respond to a report about a Cacique that was smuggled into the U.S. by the suspect taping the bird to their leg. Noah sprains both of his ankles and Preston teaches him how to get by on a day-to-day basis in a wheelchair.

programme.title: The Inspectors: It's a Wash
programme.desc: A woman's pen pal who is currently in prison has been using her to cash counterfeit money orders. A star player on the basketball team suffers a career-ending injury when he falls off a roof while doing community service.

programme.title: Lark Rise to Candleford
programme.desc: Alf is crowned 'king of the mowers' at the harvest.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build: The Million Pound Build For Children In Need
programme.desc: The team descends on Swansea to tackle one of their biggest challenges to date: building a center for young people in care and leaving care. We hear stories from vulnerable young people, as well as the founder of the Roots Foundation Wales.

programme.title: All-Round Champion: Wakeboarding
programme.desc: Daniel has to teach the group wakeboarding for the competition in only three days.

programme.title: Leave It to Bryan: Plan Interrupted
programme.desc: A young couple reaches out to Bryan for help with their pre-war home.

programme.title: Food Factory USA: Holy Cannoli!
programme.desc: At the Cheez Doodle empire in Pennsylvania, 44,000 cheesy balls are formed, baked and sprayed with atomized liquid cheese every minute. Also, Golden Cannoli in Massachusetts is the world's largest supplier of the Italian delicacy.

programme.title: Deadly Pole to Pole: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve looks back into the time of dinosaurs and uses computer images bring life into them.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs: Deadlier Than the Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes after the dinosaurs' deadliest threat.

programme.title: Ocean Treks With Jeff Corwin: Ho Chi Minh City: Viet-Yum
programme.desc: Jeff checks out the Mekong Delta, Vietnamese food, lotus flowers, and water puppets.

programme.title: Tricked!: Emotions
programme.desc: Eric and the Tricked team enter the fascinating world of feelings by conducting fake market research and an unexpected social experiment.

programme.title: Show Offs: The First Pizza Delivery Boy
programme.desc: The Show Offs are joined by Alex Boyé for a modern day musical in which Alex sings like an angel.

programme.title: Studio C
programme.desc: Cast members show where they find sketch ideas. A dad brings snakes to career day. A cop experiences an existential crisis. A dairy farmer becomes suspicious that his cows are trying to steal his identity. A kid is cyberbullied.

programme.title: All-Round Champion: Sport Climbing
programme.desc: It's the second week for the elite athletes competing in the ultimate sports competition. Sport climbing is the featured sport, and Siena must train her fellow athletes for the competition in only three days.

programme.title: The Inspectors: Jersey Blues

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Carrier

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Breaking Brig
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the crash of an armoured transport bus carrying Naval brig detainees after four prisoners escape, including a black market broker who is one of the country's biggest security threats. Meanwhile, Pride turns to Gibbs for help.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Recruits

programme.title: Movie: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice

programme.title: Movie: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A young man with extraordinary powers must confront his alien heritage when outcast members of his race invade Earth to claim it as their new home.

programme.title: Movie: Enemy of the State
programme.desc: A successful lawyer finds himself the target of a treacherous National Security Agency official after receiving evidence to a politically motivated murder. The only man that can help him is a former government operative turned surveillance expert.

programme.title: Movie: Detroit
programme.desc: After a police raid on an illegal bar set off the deadly 1967 Detroit riot, shots are heard coming from the Algiers Motel. When police, National Guardsmen and a private security guard respond three black men end up dead and several civilians are beaten.

programme.title: Movie: Men of Honor
programme.desc: A man is determined to become a navy diver in spite of the overwhelming obstacles in his way.

programme.title: Movie: Detroit
programme.desc: After a police raid on an illegal bar set off the deadly 1967 Detroit riot, shots are heard coming from the Algiers Motel. When police, National Guardsmen and a private security guard respond three black men end up dead and several civilians are beaten.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Pardon My Scotch

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Three Missing Links
programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Violent Is the Word for Curly
programme.desc: The Stooges pose as professors at Mildew College.

programme.title: Movie: Twins
programme.desc: Years after they were separated at birth, a genetically engineered fraternal twin goes to Hollywood to find his brother.

programme.title: Movie: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After hearing voices, a farmer constructs a mystical baseball diamond in his cornfield. To his surprise, deceased members from the Chicago Black Sox come to the field to play baseball.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A displaced and naïve teenager is taught karate in order to defend himself against trained bullies.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Miyagi returns to his homeland with Daniel to visit his dying father and confront old foes.

programme.title: Movie: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When five very different students report to a Saturday morning detention, they come to find that they actually have more in common than they had originally thought.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Debaters
programme.desc: Based on a true story, an East Texas debate squad train to compete and take on the Harvard debate team.

programme.title: Movie: 42
programme.desc: Explores the life of American legend Jackie Robinson and his career with the Brooklyn Dodgers.

programme.title: Movie: Fences
programme.desc: In 1950s Pittsburgh, a former Negro League player works as a waste collector to provide for his family. Struggling to keep his family afloat, he takes his frustrations out on his wife and son. He realizes he has to face his regrets for his family.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Big Four-Oh
programme.desc: Vivian becomes obsessed with achieving her lifelong dream of being a professional dancer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: She Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: Will meets a girl whom he likes, but is ashamed to take her out because of her weight.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cased Up
programme.desc: Philip defends Will when he is involved in a car accident with Hilary's boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hi-Ho Silver
programme.desc: Will and Carlton suspect the neighbours of stealing the family's heirloom silverware.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Will and the children rent the house out to a production company for a music video shoot.

programme.title: Martin: Got to Be There

programme.title: Martin: Beat It
programme.desc: Martin gets frustrated from the constant interruptions when he invites a group over to watch a boxing match.

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night

programme.desc: When Gina accidentally throws out Martin's basketball tickets, she tries to get replacement tickets from Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend
programme.desc: A jealous Martin scares away Gina's new male friend, but he regrets his actions when Gina forces him to go shopping with her.

programme.title: Martin: Holiday Blues

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: No Love Lost

programme.title: Martin: The Hoe Down in Motown

programme.desc: Nick Cannon, Montel Williams and Montell Jordan battle it out in games: Jokin’ Word, Got Props, R & Beef and the Wildstyle battle. Montell Jordan performs.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Catch

programme.title: Movie: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: A woman's ranch is her family's legacy, so, when a developer comes to town trying to buy it, she is not overly interested, that is, until he starts trying to win her trust, and her heart.

programme.title: Movie: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with planning a Paris wedding for her best friend. When she learns her ex is invited, and bringing a date, she reconnects with an old childhood pen pal in France.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream

programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.desc: An only-child is thrilled to learn she has a half-sister. The half-sister, who grew up with nothing, wants her life and will do anything to get it.

programme.title: Movie: Betrayed by My Husband
programme.desc: A woman is devastated by the loss of her husband that is until she sees him alive. When her brother-in-law dies mysteriously, she is the chief suspect and must work quickly to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand

programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of Disaster Park
programme.desc: A collection of ramshackle structures with a mystical facade lie mysteriously deserted on the tropical island of Bali. Experts investigate and uncover the ruins of a bizarre amusement park complex with a disastrous past.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Blind Rage
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search and rescue mission for a missing fisherman. Agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Deer in the Headlights
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer. Agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds, and health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's 'spy-in-the-sky' drone, Agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish. A family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets, and two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway. Meanwhile, Agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills, duck hunters are confronted for harassment and a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Deer in the Headlights

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Running with Rivals

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Powerboat Crash, Train vs. Truck
programme.desc: A powerboat breaks up during a race; a train plows through a pick up truck; a plane crashes during a test flight.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Guatemala Sailfish
programme.desc: Jimmy targets sailfish.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Salmon on Restigouche River
programme.desc: We're chasing Atlantic Salmon on Canada's Restigouche River.

programme.desc: George is fishing for wreck species into the Gulf north of Key West.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Key West Cobias

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor share their knowledge of inshore and offshore fishing.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Marathon Madness in the Florida Keys
programme.desc: Rick and Ridge are fishing for tuna and kingfish with Capt. Chris Trosset in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Mountain of Flame
programme.desc: The Creek Fire, set to become the most destructive fire in California history, ignites in the Sierras and forces the rescue of campers trapped by flames. Chief Walker and crews battle the Valley fire that threatens hundreds of homes.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Blaze Brotherhood
programme.desc: Fire season intensifies with the El Dorado Fire that takes the life of a firefighter. A major structure inferno erupts and quickly becomes a five-alarm blaze. Rookie firefighters are trained to become hand crews as resources are drained on other fires.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Napa Burning
programme.desc: In a major escalation of fire season, multiple blazes tear through Napa as firefighters scramble to protect ancient redwood forests and dozens of wineries. Cal Fire's Honor Guard pays tribute to a fallen firefighter.

programme.title: Cal Fire: The Devil's Wind
programme.desc: Cal Fire races to put down neighborhood fires in Southern California before they're fanned by the famed Santa Ana winds. When the winds strike with a vengeance, crews battle a tragic memory of the past as two big blazes escalate quickly.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stars Against the Storm
programme.desc: All-Star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest. Aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous. Even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: EJ's Ball and Pain
programme.desc: A brutal injury threatens EJ's challenge and manhood. Jeff and Steven are stalked by a territorial black bear. Rylie, Matt and Ryan land their second huge win of the challenge. Max and Gary plan a risky raid of an active beehive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Bridge Over Swampy Water
programme.desc: To cross the gator-filled swamp, Rylie, Matt and Ryan engineer an epic 50-foot bridge in a desperate attempt for resources. Harassed by a black bear, Jeff and Steven must abandon their camp. EJ stalks a gator who has been stealing his fish.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Tiny Monsters

programme.desc: Sheldon struggles with newfound popularity after utilizing statistics to help the football team.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Swedish Science Thing and the Equation for Toast
programme.desc: Sheldon invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Also, Meemaw learns more about Dr. Sturgis’ past, and Georgie’s desire for cable TV leads to a standoff between him and George Sr.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball With Zip
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to take a break from science when his new obsession with 'The Lord of the Rings' leads to an unhealthy habit.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Family Dynamics and a Red Fiero
programme.desc: Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project, and Thanksgiving dinner turns into a family fight when George Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce
programme.desc: When George Sr. asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hideout at Tam’s for his first sleepover.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Brisket, Voodoo and Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The kids brainstorm ways to resolve a family feud when Meemaw refuses to give George St. her brisket recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: Nick News: Kids, Immigration and Equality
programme.desc: Children who have made an impact on real world issues are profiled.

programme.title: Young Dylan: My Fair Charlie
programme.desc: A family's world is upended when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Destination Dinohenge
programme.desc: Go-getting reporter Amelia accompanies Ollie and his mom, Dr. Akana, to investigate the mysterious Dinohenge statues. They run into an evil warrior named Void Knight and a threat that puts the entire world in danger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Doodle Dimension/ Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.title: Danger Force: Manlee Men
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Battle of the Grandpas/ Prankaversary
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment
programme.desc: When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily. Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time.

programme.title: The Loud House: Friends in Dry Places/ Coupe Dreams
programme.desc: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering. In order to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local rideshare driver.

programme.title: The Loud House: Love Birds/ Rocket Men
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected. After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: On Thin Ice/ Room and Hoard
programme.desc: Lynn's sports superstitions cause chaos at a hockey match. Unable to part with their childhood toys, the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hurl, Interrupted/ Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret./ After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car. Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob reminds him how much fun it is to be a kid.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Heavy Hearts

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Pain in the Backwoods

programme.desc: The crew tries to get their machinery across surging rivers to set up their new mountaintop jade mine.
