programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Sir Prince of Darkness
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack's bucket lists collide when father and son head to the UK. While both want to visit Stonehenge, the mythic structure of Druid lore, the rest of their itinerary is up for debate, and both Ozzy and Jack each want their way.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Like Forefathers, Like Sons
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack venture to historic Jamestown, Virginia. Jack is determined to find out whether any Osbournes were among the first British colonists in America, but Ozzy is obsessed with the idea that the early settlers resorted to cannibalism.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Like Father, Like Sun
programme.desc: At their Key West starting point, Ozzy and Jack do some deep-sea fishing, hunt pythons in the Everglades and drive by Mar-a-Lago, President Trump's Winter White House.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Texas, Bloody Texas
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy are at odds over the broken RV, but they find a recreational way to let out their frustrations. Ozzy meets with a Texas-based Black Sabbath cover band, and the boys find themselves involved in a bizarre game of bingo.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Spicy In-Laws
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy take a trip down to Cajun country, where Jack's in-laws live in Louisiana. In New Orleans, they take a trip down memory lane with an old family friend from Ozzy's early touring days.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Ozzy tries to persuade Jack to hit the road but Jack's new baby is due to be born and he can't leave LA. Ozzy and Jack conspire to convince his sister, Kelly to take the wheel if Jack has to stay behind.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: Ozzy and Kelly are frantically awoken in the middle of the night by a call from Jack that his new baby is going to be born tonight. They quickly pack up the RV and a very exhausted Ozzy and Kelly make their five hour trek back to LA.

programme.title: Biography: Mick Foley
programme.desc: Follow the career of Mick Foley, a 2013 WWE Hall of Fame inductee better known as 'Mankind.' He was a fan-favorite during WWE's 'Attitude Era.'

programme.title: Biography: Bret 'Hitman' Hart
programme.desc: Follow the career of Bret Hart, one of the greatest technical athletes in WWE history, earning him nicknames such as 'The Hit Man.'

programme.title: The Cube: Talk to Me Nice
programme.desc: The world's toughest game show continues. This week, host Dwyane Wade steps back into the arena to help husband and wife team Kal and Whitney beat The Cube for a chance to win $250,000.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: It's Electric
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: It's Electric
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Charlotte McKinney

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tells Terry to find the author of an anonymous firefighter blog from the station and shut it down. With everyone a suspect, no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire in Sex Town
programme.desc: When a perverted arsonist strikes Tacoma, the TPD and the TFD must put aside their rivalries to solve the case. To everyone's surprise, the two crews discover they are not as different as they think. Unfortunately, the lovefest may not last.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Opa!
programme.desc: With only days left on the vacation, Scott finally shows up to Greece. Kendall feels like she’s being left out of the family fun and is missing out on a bonding experience with Brody.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Signs Point to North
programme.desc: Kim needs to deliver earlier than planned, Kris prepares the house for her new granddaughter's arrival, Brody gives Bruce advice on a new friendship, and Khloe tries to make peace with what's happening in her life.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 1
programme.desc: The family hears about a surprise Kanye is planning for Kim's birthday. Kris goes into panic mode when she learns Kim's house is delayed and Kourtney and Khloé plot revenge on judgmental Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rocking the Cradle
programme.desc: When Kourtney surprises Scott with unexpected news of a third child on the way, Scott shuts down and tries to run away. Meanwhile, as Kim races to get the final details of her wedding in check, she runs into major drama with Brody.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Journey to the Altar
programme.desc: Kim and Kanye take their closest friends and family on an intimate, behind the scenes adventure from Paris to Italy, and through the whirlwind of days and events leading up to their exquisite wedding.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: About Bruce (Part One)
programme.desc: Bruce and the family share their raw, emotional feelings and conversations about Bruce's decision to live publicly as the woman he has always been on the inside, in the hopes that other families on a similar journey will know that they are not alone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: About Bruce (Part Two)
programme.desc: Bruce and the family share their raw, emotional feelings and conversations about Bruce's decision to live publicly as the woman he has always been on the inside, in the hopes that other families on a similar journey will know that they are not alone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A New York Family Affair
programme.desc: Kanye invites the entire family to NYC for his fashion show, but Khloé is torn over whether Lamar can handle such a big first appearance since his accident. Meanwhile, Kim tries to keep Scott busy in NYC, and Lamar meet Caitlyn for the first time.

programme.title: Rob and Chyna: Are You Still Texting B#@tches?
programme.desc: In the series premiere, Rob and Chyna are planning their new lives together as parents until suspicions on either side lead to Rob moving out of the house.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Bun in the Oven
programme.desc: Khloé has some big news to share with her family, but her strained relationship with Corey threatens to overshadow the big reveal. Meanwhile, Kris gets a complex about her sagging earlobes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Photo Shoot Dispute
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloé. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters Napa: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Four champion grill masters are each already $10,000 richer, and now they return to see who will claim $50,000 more! Half of the appetizer basket is taken up with a porky surprise.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Meat
programme.desc: Guy's digging into a meat lover's paradise. In Colorado Springs, a Jamaican joint dishes out killer curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, a funky beer bar serves up wild boar sliders and outrageous pork belly mac and cheese fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Vikings to Wings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into Scandinavian, Persian and an Asian spin on wings. A vintage food truck in Portland, OR., rolling out wraps stuffed with Norwegian specialties, and, in Sunrise, Fla., authentic Iranian cuisine like chicken pomegranate stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Alaskan Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads to Fairbanks for an Alaskan culinary adventure. There's authentic German specialties at a super funky food truck, a food-and-music jamfest featuring Cuban favorites and a local hot spot servin' up comfort with meatball subs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Righteous Bites
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is enjoying dishes from both sides of the pacific. In Los Angeles, he's trying a fat Jerry Sammy and a number of fried favorites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sauced and Spiced
programme.desc: Guy heads to Tennessee for a traditional Mediterranean lamb dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Daddy's Famous Stew
programme.desc: Trisha teaches her nephews their granddaddy's (her daddy's) famous Brunswick stew recipe.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Our Guys' Favorites!
programme.desc: In honor of the amazing men and fathers in their lives, Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, cook up a few of their favorite dishes, including their daddy's biscuits and sausage gravy, and Garth's personal creation, taco pizza.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Payback Day
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is rewarding her hardworking crew for standing by as she and her guests have eaten their way through more than 500 dishes on Valerie's Home Cooking.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Backyard Beach Party
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has enjoyed many wonderful summer meals on the shores of the Pacific, and she's welcoming the warm weather with an Italian-style backyard beach party with her family.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Well Done, Dad
programme.desc: Ree brings her dad a celebration meal with all of his favorite foods. A luxurious, slow-cooked burgundy beef stew, creamy cheese grits casserole and super-tasty blistered green beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Way Things Used To Be
programme.desc: Ladd and his father, Chuck, are out feeding cattle on the ranch, sharing stories about the old days and looking forward to a slap-up cowboy spread prepared by Ree Drummond. She's mixing up a fabulous PW steak rub to sprinkle over juicy breakfast steaks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dad's Dinner Delivery
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her son, Todd, are delivering dinner to her dad and stepmom, so Ree makes an Italian meal of creamy chicken cacciatore soup, parmesan herb drops biscuits and Italian salad with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Film Crew Takeout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks food for her kid crew to take home after a busy day of filming. She makes Alex's veggie packed burritos, Mauricio's tortilla soup, Paige's s'mores brownies and Stu's baked BBQ ribs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's the Man!
programme.desc: For Father's Day, Molly Yeh is whipping up the creamiest, most-decadent dishes around. She's making saucy chicken alfredo lasagna, toasted ravioli salad with a creamy marinara ranch and, for dessert, chocolate dipped strawberry krumkake cannoli.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Late-Night Feedings (For New Mom and Dad)
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is sending a care package to Duff Goldman and his wife, Johnna, to celebrate the arrival of their baby. She makes quinoa, sweet potato and black bean bowls with parsley yogurt dressing and no-bake chocolate peanut butter bars.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Shoebox Memories
programme.desc: Trisha and Beth take a trip down memory lane as they go through mom and dad's shoebox of recipes. They pull out comforting recipes to cook, such as company chicken, Mama's scalloped potatoes and wild scuppernong pie with cinnamon swirl.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Family Favorites with Allie Colleen
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's daughter, Allie, joins her in the kitchen to learn some tips and tricks as they breathe new life into some favourite childhood dishes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Cook-Out of Control!
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are amping up summer foods for an epic summer celebration. Their cookout menu includes triple decker burgers with roasted vegetables and cheese sauce, lobster roll panzanella and a grilled biscuit sundae with peaches and blueberries.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Introduce Your 'Cue
programme.desc: A new crop of barbecue pitmasters step onto the scene and introduce themselves through their food. Captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson choose their teams and get ready for their first no-limits team battle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: West Coast Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy goes to Cali for a mouth watering variety of killer cuisine.

programme.desc: After Paula accidentally burns down her kitchen, Coach McGuirk offers to pay for it to get fixed. Paula's parents are getting a divorce so Jason fakes a divorce to fit in.

programme.title: Home Movies: Bad Influences
programme.desc: Jason and Brendon realize they snack more when they are together and vow not to see each other again in order to lose weight.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Slip

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Father

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Job

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Diet

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Possession
programme.desc: Richard Watterson seems supernaturally attached to his old refrigerator.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Master
programme.desc: The Wattersons play a fantasy role-playing board game to resolve their differences.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Prank
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin's harmless pranks on Dad spiral hopelessly out of control.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Laziest
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin challenge Dad to a 'lazy-off.'

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Itch to Explore

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Escape from Family Dinner

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Monster in the Garden
programme.desc: Craig is determined to catch the monster that has been wreaking havoc in Granddad's garden.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Vulture's Nest

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Climb

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Kid From 3030

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sour Candy Trials

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Fort Williams

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Cousin of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig takes his cousin, Bryson, to the Creek, and accidentally starts a water balloon war.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Ancients of the Creek

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Craig and the Kid's Table

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: In the Key of the Creek
programme.desc: During a rainy day, Craig uses his toys to create a Creek adventure.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Children of the Dog

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Jessica Shorts
programme.desc: Five shorts following Craig's little sister Jessica as she tries to become the best at video games, experiences losing a tooth, creates a T.V show, saves a sword, and takes family game night too seriously.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Craig of the Beach
programme.desc: Craig hits the beach with his friends and family, but starts to worry his father is more fun than him.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Other Side: The Tournament
programme.desc: To win his dad a special prize, Craig enlists the help of his friends to compete in a tournament with the Other Side of the Creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Trick or Creek
programme.desc: Follow Craig as he leads his best friends on comical journeys by their neighborhood creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Brother Builder
programme.desc: As Craig races against time to build a super important invention, we learn how Craig became such a clever inventor!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Body Swap
programme.desc: Fed up with their home experiences, Craig, Kelsey and JP agree to switch bodies!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Spoon

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Authority
programme.desc: Granny JoJo's overprotective behaviour puts the Wattersons in danger.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Man

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Deal

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snootful
programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Phase One, Complete
programme.desc: Charlie is uncomfortable when his latest romantic conquest befriends both Jake and Evelyn. Alan gets too competitive when playing a board game with Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Merry Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Charlie tries to win back a former flame by hosting a large Thanksgiving dinner with his family.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Like Buffalo
programme.desc: When Jake imitates one of Charlie's sexist remarks, Judith's support group decides that Charlie's home is an unfit environment for the child. Charlie is forced to cajole the group into letting Jake continue to spend the weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go Get Mommy's Bra
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to trade cars with his mother for a day and ends up with major regrets.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Eat Human Flesh With Wooden Teeth?
programme.desc: A stressed Judith goes to Hawaii, leaving Jake with Alan and Charlie for an entire week.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Weekend in Bangkok With Two Olympic Gymnasts
programme.desc: When Charlie agrees to watch Jake for the weekend, he quickly realizes that Jake's idea of a good time is going out for fast food and video games, which is quite different from his own ideas of fun.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.desc: Bindi and the family plan an emotional surprise for Terri in the Crocoseum. Chandler must step up during the croc show, while Robert gets hands-on with the zoo's newest members: three adorable tiger cubs.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Croc Mission Lives On
programme.desc: The family makes their annual trip to the Steve Irwin Wildlife Reserve to capture, study and release wild crocodiles. They continue the mission started by Steve & Terri, providing scientific research vital to the protection of Australia's apex predators.

programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Needle in a Haystack

programme.title: North Woods Law: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Officer McDermott finds an abandoned truck, sparking a winding investigation. Officer Holmes and Sgt. Lucas rescue paddlers of a capsized canoe. Later, Holmes responds to a moose accident, while OFC. Frye consoles a bereft woman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cracking a Cold Case
programme.desc: Officer Canfield handles a group of ATV riders reported for riding prohibited trails. Officer Holmes investigates a suspected illegal deer kill, and an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that might be linked to a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis
programme.desc: A horrific rock climbing accident on Cannon Cliffs sends two officers and an emergency team on a heroic helicopter rescue mission. A combative man is found illegally ridding an OHRV and is questioned by Officer Crouse, and a moose causes a traffic jam.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.desc: Lisa discovers her amazing talent for doing crossword puzzles and becomes an expert cruciverbalist, and she soon enters a citywide crossword puzzle tournament. Homer discovers an underground crossword-betting ring.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wreck of the Relationship
programme.desc: When Bart disrespects Homer's authority, Homer makes a point to try his hand at parenting. This proves fruitless, so Marge signs them up for the Relation Ship, where they’ll resolve their conflicts at sea.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Father's Watch
programme.desc: Worried that Bart is destined for failure, Marge turns to a series of parenting 'experts' for advice. Homer decides to cash in on one expert’s advice by opening up a trophy store in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: In this Flanders family-focused episode, Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith causing great distress for Ned, who sends him to live with the Simpsons in an attempt to scare him back into God's arms.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: The good fortune of the Whiskers comes to a sudden end when history repeats itself with terrifying consequences for Swift. Meanwhile pregnant Flint leads Hakuna Matata home only to be confronted by local land-grabbers.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas

programme.title: Planet Earth: Making of
programme.desc: This stunning series examines critical environmental and conservation issues.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Yellowstone
programme.desc: In 1985, wolves were released back into Yellowstone National Park. The re-introduction of the predator has set off a cascade of events through the food chain.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: July-August: A Time of Migration

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Sour Grapes
programme.desc: Two women with a shared wall between their townhouses become increasingly volatile with each other as their once good relationship disintegrates. Food fights, physical altercations, and mutual vandalism will finally come to a bloody climax.

programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery: Flames in the Night
programme.desc: The brutal murder of 19-year-old Jessica Chambers, found severely burned on the side of the road in rural Courtland, Mississippi, sends shock waves across the nation as the twisting and turning hunt for her killer creates a rift in her community.

programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery: Justice for Jessica
programme.desc: As the trial unfolds in the fiery murder of 19-year-old Jessica Chambers, a shocking turn of events threatens to tear apart her family and the community. But everything changes when another brutal crime is discovered in Louisiana.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: This Bullet's for You
programme.desc: A couple from Michigan realizes a long held dream when they relocate to Florida, but their life in the sun is destroyed when they get into a fatal conflict with their neighbour.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gone in the Night
programme.desc: A couple wakes up to find their baby's crib empty. They are certain she has been kidnapped. But many believe the parents are the culprits.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bait and Kill
programme.desc: When Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears from the quiet Dallas suburb of Garland, what appears to be a straightforward missing persons case quickly morphs into a jigsaw puzzle of mistaken identity, fraud, and murder.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: He Didn't Have to Die
programme.desc: Eric Cates is found burned to death in his pickup truck. Police suggest suicide, but Eric's mother is convinced of foul play. Later, a motorist pursues Zach Lamb in a car chase and kills him in a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: In a sleepy spot near Silicon Valley, high school boys are being harassed online by a new girl in town. Before long, secrets unfold that tear the community apart. But one mother has heard it all before and won't stop until justice is finally served.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tainted Love
programme.desc: When love turns to obsession, these women make their lover their possession.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, let alone find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, let alone find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Traditional Goes Ultra Modern
programme.desc: A couple and their young son are moving to Waco from Denver, Colorado, in hopes of finding a slower pace, big acreage and a whole lot of style. Chip and Jo transform a country home into the modern dream they're looking for.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Flip House to Family Project
programme.desc: Chip and Jo return to their roots and work to give a home a clean, new look, until Jo decides she wants her sister and brother-in-law to buy the house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Ranch House to Modern Mediterranean Retreat
programme.desc: The Aguilar family wants to find a forever home that fits their family of four and reflects their personal style. With a total budget of $275,000, the Aguilars settle on a ranch house with plenty of opportunities.

programme.title: Mind for Design: What Is the 70/30 Rule?

programme.title: Super Dad: Skate Ramp for Six

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Rock Star Renovation
programme.desc: Musician Mike Herrera and his wife, Holli, are moving from Washington state to Waco so they can be closer to Holli's family. They need a house with plenty of space for their two children and a large music studio for Mike.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Modern Cabin Makeover
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son. The project quickly turns into one of the most unique renovations yet with a little help from former first lady Laura Bush.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: New Chapter for Family of Four
programme.desc: The Jacksons need four bedrooms and three bathrooms that, ideally, can be renovated within their budget.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wowing In Wildwood
programme.desc: A couple that's relocating from the Washington, DC, area to Wildwood, New Jersey, finds the perfect beach house for their family of five. It needs serious renovating, and while they have a big budget, they also have a big wish list.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Surfside Revive in Texas
programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Grits: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" an episode that has been bugging him for years. He finally comes to terms with grits and polenta while a certain Southern gentleman returns to teach the corniest bread of all.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' the pot roast from 2001. He's learned a lot since then, and it shows, because this is what pot roast is supposed to be.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chicago
programme.desc: Ali Khan's Windy City expectations are as high as Chicago's Willis Tower, so his breakfast is a tower of fried chicken, biscuits, egg and bacon. For lunch, Ali dives into the city's unofficial sandwich, the Italian beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Brew Town? Food Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Milwaukee for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sin City Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan is on the hunt for breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Santa Barbara Bargains
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Santa Barbara, Calif. He has a bacon and egg sandwich on a buttery brioche, bacon wrapped, fully loaded hot dogs, and a dairy-free "cowboy cookie," a local favourite.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down in Cleveland
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Cleveland looking for irresistible breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals. He hits the ground hot with flapjacks topped with white chocolate mole with candied jalapenos.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: Three powerhouse chefs put their personalities on a plate in the Wildfire Round. The chefs try to cream their competition in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire is inspired by a good ol’ ranch style spread.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Charleston, South Carolina
programme.desc: Andrew steps beyond the carriage rides and stuffy plantation tours to see what really makes the Charleston food scene tick.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Baltimore and Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: There's a long line of tradition on the menu when Andrew visits Baltimore and the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Southern Comfort Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the comfort food of the South. He visits a historic cafe in Atlanta for fried chicken and a Memphis joint for ribs. Then he checks out biscuits in Nashville, frogmore stew near Charleston, SC, and shrimp and grits in Savannah.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.
