programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Frittle Problem
programme.desc: When Henry's dad gets an offer for a new job in Bordertown, Henry and Ray go undercover to try and stop Henry's dad from getting the job and prevent Henry from having to move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Budget Cuts
programme.desc: When the Vice Mayor cuts Captain Man and Kid Danger's budget to build a high-speed railway in Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must figure out creative ways to save money.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Brawl in the Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Saturday Night Lies
programme.desc: When Ray runs into an ex-girlfriend, he tries to impress her by pretending that Henry, Charlotte, and Jasper are his children.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Unexpected Guest
programme.desc: A familiar face arrives on Earth and Zayto dismisses his quest as a distraction. After he saves the Rangers from a powerful Sporix Beast, Zayto realizes an important lesson.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Sporix Unleashed
programme.desc: Ollie carries out a plan to catch Sporix without his teammates’ knowledge. When monsters take advantage of his idea, Ollie realizes the benefit of working as a team.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guilt Trip/ Short Cut
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world./ When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself – CJ.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Battle of the Grandpas/ Prankaversary
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: Really Loud Music
programme.desc: Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound, or try to make something that the whole world will love just to win a song writing contest.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Grave Mistake/ Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy and Haiku compete to be the new president of the Young Mortician's Club at school. Leni worries about her friendship with Miguel and Fiona when she's promoted to temporary manager at work.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: The Queen Is Back
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob
programme.desc: Squidward gets a restraining order against SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Curse of Savanti Romero
programme.desc: As the turtles get ready for Halloween, the city is invaded by strange monsters.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Crypt of Dracula
programme.desc: The turtles travel to Transylvania in order to stop Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Frankenstein Experiment
programme.desc: After recruiting Frankenstein's monster, Savanti releases all of the creatures into the 21st century.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Monsters Among Us
programme.desc: The turtles return, only to find a world run by monsters, and start to regret their own actions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wanted: Bebop and Rocksteady
programme.desc: When 80s Shredder and Krang appear in our dimension, they employ Bebop and Rocksteady and find their plans are succeeding better than ever.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Foot Walks Again
programme.desc: The Turtles must train their 80’s counterparts to face a greater threat than they’ve ever encountered.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Home Improvement/ Undivided Attention
programme.desc: Laird is nervous to host movie night at his house, so Ronnie Anne helps him pretend Arturo’s pad is his own!/ Carlota can’t seem to pay attention to anything but her phone, so Carlos sets her up – with a math tutor!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate Chops/ Taco The Town
programme.desc: Used to being top dog, Carl can’t handle when Adelaide joins his karate class and becomes the star student./ Hector starts selling Rosa’s delicious tacos but gets overwhelmed when they’re more popular than the mercado!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Legend/ The Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia save a group of kids from a Dominator invasion as the kids tell stories about a mythic hero that sounds awfully familiar.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: Party Poopers/ Waste of Time
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia go from planet to planet helping people live free and have fun.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Hot Shot/ The Night Out
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia go from planet to planet helping people live free and have fun.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Search for Captain Time/ The Heebie Jeebies
programme.desc: Lord Hater accidentally recruits a bloodthirsty alien hunter to help him find his missing pet. Wander and Sylvia search a creepy forest planet for a mystical power.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Sick Day/ The Sky Guy
programme.desc: Wander comes down with a cold and must depend on Sylvia to take on his many helping duties. Wander discovers a new species and accidentally exposes them to an entire new world.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Robomechabotatron/ The Flower
programme.desc: Wander must convince Sylvia, Hater and Peepers to work together to control an ancient giant robot. Sylvia scours the destroyed galaxy to save a rare flower and cheer up Wander.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax and Hiro
programme.desc: Hiro gives Baymax a battery boost chip upgrade.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Conquering the Ogre’s Dungeon!
programme.desc: In the end, Hyuga and Hikaru were no match for the legendary Blader Lui Shirosagi. Naturally, they both demand a rematch, but before the brothers can face Lui again, they have to conquer the Ogre’s Dungeon.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Jet-Black Sun! Vex Lucius!
programme.desc: Lain’s Blading prowess seems to be the stuff of myth. But that doesn’t matter to Hyuga — he’s ready to go head-to-head anyway! When he does, he learns something incredible about Lain’s Bey, Vex Lucius.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Rats on a Train
programme.desc: The Lab Rats get their first mission to stop Davenport's hi-tech super fast train from speeding out of control. When they discover that Leo accidentally discarded the braking system they were supposed to install, they are forced to improvise.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part One
programme.desc: Ezra inadvertently messes up one of Kanan's missions and is forced to escape with the crew of the Ghost in order to survive. The boys find out Kanan and his team are freedom fighters, and their next assignment is freeing Wookie prisoners.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part Two
programme.desc: During his attempt to save the team from the Imperial trap, Ezra is captured by Agent Kallus. The rebels rescue the kid and set off on their original mission: to liberate the Wookiees destined for a terrible fate.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Droids of Distress
programme.desc: The rebels intercept a shipment of powerful weapons intended for the Empire, but the sale of the weapons doesn’t go according to plan when a frightened C-3PO calls the authorities.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Fighter Flight
programme.desc: Hera sends Ezra and Zeb into the city on a simple errand, but in a foolhardy stunt, the boys steal a TIE fighter instead. They wind up using the captured ship to free innocent prisoners en route to a labor camp.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Rise of the Old Masters
programme.desc: An underground broadcast reveals that the Empire is holding a Jedi Master prisoner. In a bold rescue attempt the crew of the Ghost voyages to the bleak prison world of Stygeon Prime only to fall into a trap engineered by the Inquisitor.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Breaking Ranks
programme.desc: Ezra infiltrates Lothal's Academy for Young Imperials, where the Empire identifies Force-sensitive children and indoctrinates the youths of Lothal into joining their ranks. With the help of cadet Zare Leonis, he gets vital information for the rebels.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Out of Darkness
programme.desc: Hera and Sabine take the Phantom to an abandoned asteroid base for resupply but become stranded there since the boys neglected to properly prepare the shuttle. Ravenous creatures attack while the Ghost crew scrambles to extract them.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Empire Day
programme.desc: On Empire Day, a government-mandated celebration of the founding of the Empire, an old friend of Ezra's parents, Tseebo, seeks help from the crew to escape off world with important Imperial information.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Gathering Forces
programme.desc: To draw the Imperials away from Tseebo, Kanan lures the Inquisitor to a planet filled with dangerous creatures. In the heat of battle, Ezra taps into his growing abilities with the Force allowing the Phantom to flee.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Path of the Jedi
programme.desc: Ezra must face a great challenge as part of his growth as a member of the team.

programme.desc: Emmitt Smith makes an indelible impact on the game of football and builds a case as the greatest running back of all time by breaking one of the NFL's hallowed records and making everyone around him better.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Rice
programme.desc: 'A Football Life' chronicles the story of how an un-recruited small-town wide receiver became the greatest of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Doug Williams
programme.desc: Doug Williams grew up with no running water in rural Louisiana during an era when few African Americans played quarterback. He would overcome adversity and prejudice to become a Heisman nominee, first round pick and Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: A Football Life: LaDainian Tomlinson
programme.desc: The career and life of LaDainian Tomlinson including his revenge against the Patriots and an emotional trip to learn about his family's roots.

programme.title: The Super Bowl That Wasn't
programme.desc: The story behind how Arizona lost the Super Bowl in 1993 by refusing to celebrate Martin Luther King Jr's birthday as a holiday. Revisit this often forgotten piece of NFL history from various perspectives both new and old.

programme.title: Breaking Ground: A Story of HBCU Football and the NFL
programme.desc: Look at the history and impact of historically black colleges and universities through interviews and profiles of former alumni.

programme.title: America's Game: 1987 Washington Redskins
programme.desc: A sweeping documentary series profiling each Super Bowl-winning team in NFL history.

programme.title: America's Game: 2013 Seattle Seahawks
programme.desc: The story of the 2013 Seattle Seahawks and their run to Super Bowl XLVIII told through the eyes of Russell Wilson, Richard Sherman and Head Coach Pete Carroll.

programme.title: America's Game: 2019 Kansas City Chiefs
programme.desc: A look back at the 2019 Kansas City Chiefs run to Super Bowl LIV through the eyes of Super Bowl MVP Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and Tyrann Mathieu.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jim Brown
programme.desc: The football life of perhaps the greatest player in NFL history and his impact both on and off the field.
